description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image with a cache on node_modules and two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage define a grunt_build job that runs as builder user: useradd -m -p 123 builder, apt-get update, apt-get -yq install chromium git zip gzip tar, npm install -g bower grunt-cli, npm install, bower install --allow-root --no-interactive, chmod 777 -fR ., su builder -c "grunt", and then pipe lcov.info files to node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; it only runs on master or develop branches, produces artifacts ./${CI_PROJECT_NAME}.zip and ./doc, and captures coverage with the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/. In the deploy stage add a marketplace_deploy job that runs useradd -m -p 123 builder, npm install -g bower grunt-cli, npm install, bower install --allow-root --no-interactive, chmod 777 -fR ., su builder -c "grunt build", and uploads the generated zip via curl to http://marketplace.webpich.com/api/v2/marketplace/spas/token-$MARKETPLACE_TOKEN; it only runs on the master branch.
